title: lichen_util.c:15 lichen_sha256 conflated error handling loses detail
description: Contract violation: lichen_sha256() - Lines 27-30 conflate tc_sha256_init, update, and final failures into single -EIO. TinyCrypt can fail if output is NULL (checked earlier) or internal state corruption. The conflation is documented as intentional (line 25) but loses debug info. WHY: Different failures have different root causes (init vs update vs final). HOW to fix: If debug info desired, log which stage failed before returning -EIO. Current behavior is acceptable for production.
